testcase.name: beforetest

error.message: Unresolved compilation problems: The annotation @BeforeTest is disallowed for this location void[] is an invalid type Syntax error on token "besttest", AnnotationName expected after this token Illegal modifier for parameter besttest; only final is permitted Syntax error, insert "[ ]" to complete Dimension Syntax error, insert ";" to complete BlockStatements driver cannot be resolved to a variable AfterTest cannot be resolved to a type void[] is an invalid type Syntax error on token "aftertest", AnnotationName expected after this token Illegal modifier for parameter aftertest; only final is permitted Syntax error, insert "[ ]" to complete Dimension Syntax error, insert ";" to complete LocalVariableDeclarationStatement driver cannot be resolved Syntax error, insert "enum Identifier" to complete EnumHeader Syntax error, insert "EnumBody" to complete BlockStatement

testcase.error:
